activityStreamStatus.title: Activity Stream Status
activityStreamStatus.description: The status of the database activity stream

associatedRoles.title: Associated Roles
associatedRoles.description: The IAM roles associated with the DB cluster

autoMinorVersionUpgrade.title: Auto Minor Version Upgrade
autoMinorVersionUpgrade.description: Whether minor version upgrades are applied automatically

availabilityZones.title: Availability Zones
availabilityZones.description: The Availability Zones where the DB cluster is deployed

backupRetentionPeriod.title: Backup Retention Period
backupRetentionPeriod.description: The number of days to retain automated backups

clusterCreateTime.title: Cluster Create Time
clusterCreateTime.description: The time when the DB cluster was created

copyTagsToSnapshot.title: Copy Tags To Snapshot
copyTagsToSnapshot.description: Whether to copy tags to snapshots

databaseName.title: Database Name
databaseName.description: The name of the initial database

dbClusterArn.title: ARN
dbClusterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB cluster

dbClusterIdentifier.title: DB Cluster Identifier
dbClusterIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of the RDS DB cluster

dbClusterMembers.title: DB Cluster Members
dbClusterMembers.description: The DB instances that belong to the cluster

dbClusterResourceId.title: DB Cluster Resource ID
dbClusterResourceId.description: The unique resource identifier for the DB cluster

earliestRestorableTime.title: Earliest Restorable Time
earliestRestorableTime.description: The earliest time to which the DB cluster can be restored

endpoint.title: Writer Endpoint
endpoint.description: The writer endpoint for the DB cluster

engine.title: Engine
engine.description: The database engine type (e.g., aurora-mysql, aurora-postgresql)

engineMode.title: Engine Mode
engineMode.description: The engine mode of the DB cluster (e.g., provisioned, serverless)

engineVersion.title: Engine Version
engineVersion.description: The version of the database engine

globalWriteForwardingStatus.title: Global Write Forwarding Status
globalWriteForwardingStatus.description: The status of write forwarding for a secondary cluster in a global database

httpEndpointEnabled.title: HTTP Endpoint Enabled
httpEndpointEnabled.description: Whether the HTTP endpoint (Data API) is enabled for Aurora Serverless

iamDatabaseAuthenticationEnabled.title: IAM Database Authentication Enabled
iamDatabaseAuthenticationEnabled.description: Whether IAM database authentication is enabled

kmsKeyId.title: KMS Key ID
kmsKeyId.description: The KMS key identifier for encryption

latestRestorableTime.title: Latest Restorable Time
latestRestorableTime.description: The latest time to which the DB cluster can be restored

masterUsername.title: Master Username
masterUsername.description: The master username for the DB cluster

multiAZ.title: Multi-AZ
multiAZ.description: Whether the DB cluster is deployed across multiple Availability Zones

networkType.title: Network Type
networkType.description: The network type for the DB cluster

port.title: Port
port.description: The port number for the DB cluster

readerEndpoint.title: Reader Endpoint
readerEndpoint.description: The reader endpoint for load-balancing read connections across cluster members

status.title: Status
status.description: The current status of the DB cluster

storageEncrypted.title: Storage Encrypted
storageEncrypted.description: Whether the DB cluster storage is encrypted

storageType.title: Storage Type
storageType.description: The storage type of the DB cluster

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: The tags associated with the DB cluster

vpcSecurityGroups.title: VPC Security Groups
vpcSecurityGroups.description: The VPC security groups associated with the DB cluster

dbSubnetGroup.title: DB Subnet Group
dbSubnetGroup.description: The subnet group associated with the DB cluster
